description: Cross-chain handlers that accept payloads without checking the source `chainId` or endpoint domain allow replay of messages from other networks or forks. Attackers can re-trigger transfers, minting, or governance actions on unintended chains.
name: Missing Chain ID Validation in Cross-Chain Messages
remediation: - Bind every inbound message to an expected source chain/domain and trusted sender. - Include `chainId`/domain separators in signed payloads and verify them before execution. - Maintain replay protection (nonces) per (sourceChain, sourceSender).
